name: Easy Bread
ingredients: 2 tsp instant or rapid rise yeast
instructions: Mix flour, yeast and salt in a large bowl. Add water, then use the handle of a wooden spoon to mix until all the flour is incorporated. Dough will be wet and sloppy – not kneadable, but not runny like cake batter. Adjust with more water or flour if needed for right consistency.
Cover with cling wrap or plate, leave on counter for 2-3 hours until it doubles in volume.
Preheat oven to 230°C/450°F (220° fan) 30 minutes prior to baking.
Shape dough: Sprinkle work surface with 1 tbsp flour, scrape dough out of bowl. Sprinkle top with 1/2 tbsp flour.
Put into bread tray with baking paper and bake for 30-45 minutes.
Cool on rack for 10 minutes before slicing.
